span.p:
Parse webhook payload:
job_uuid, ClientId,
customer_name, service_address,
JobType, Status, SubStatus

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RETURN skipped:
graveyard job for SMS only,
no SO created

path A, already_existed

PATH C:
Neither Contact nor Property

Search child properties
of contact matching
service_address
